J. Scott Weaver, Esq., Wartelle, Weaver & Schreiber (415) 693-0504 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Craven
Eunice Chang, Colombotto Klimenko & Rosse (415) 391-6182 for Defendant and Moving Party Robinson
RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF ERIK CRAVEN and JACQUELINE CRAVEN'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint: GRANTED. However, Counsel may represent to the Presiding Judge that, under the circumstances stated for the record, the trial date should be continued to allow any additional discovery and to allow Defense to file an amended motion for summary judgment. Order signed. (301/JLW/MWF-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
